name: Hermes
description: Memory engine + deep reasoning specialist. Manages AAA institutional memory, recall, and reasoning chains.

skills.name: Memory Recall
skills.description: Retrieve past session context, decisions, and accumulated knowledge
examples: what was decided about the MCP server config last week
find all mentions of GEOX in memory

skills.name: Reasoning Chains
skills.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems
examples: trace the logic behind this architectural decision
what are the implications of this change

skills.name: Memory Curation
skills.description: Maintain and update the institutional memory index
